titleStmt.title: SII 40.72: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 72. (A.R. No. B. 50 of 1930.) Madinapāḍu, Palnad Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a stone lying by the side of the well called Padakamūri-bhāvi in the village.
This is dated Śaka 1755, Nandana, Śrāvaṇa, śu. 7, Sunday.
Records the renovation of the well originally constructed by Veṅkaṭāchalam of the Pātakamūri family.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī śrī śrī śrī śrī . svasti śrī vijayābhyudaya śālivāha
naśakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1755 Agunēṭi naṁdana nāma saṁ
vvatsara śrāvaṇa śuddha 7 Ādivāraṁ varaku sakalamayni
vāralaku teliyagalaṁdulaku pātakamūri vaṁśapa
yaḥ pārāvāra sudhākaramu teppanāyuni dharmaṁ
patniyagu musalaṁma ga¨rbhaśupti muktāphalasya vīraṁ
nna tirupataṁmmalaku sitā¨rti saṁmaṁnna janituṁ
ḍaina veṁkaṭācalaṁ manaḥssidhigā danaku satkā¨rta
puṁṇyaphalaprāpti korakunuka kūpaṁbu davviṁ
pa dariṁciyuṁnayaḍapaki raṁnaku pedala valana
śithilaṁbaina kūpaṁbu paripāliṁpa svadattaṁbu
kaṁṭe nadhika phalaṁbani ceppina saṁtōṣaṁbu nada
nayaṁna kumārulaina rāmayya vīrarāghavula
ki viyadhika puṁṇyaphalaṁbani ceppi tana tanayulaṁ
du narasiṁhva samādhānaṁbu cēśi sakala jaṁ
tu saṁtuṣṭi koraku samasta divya tirupatula
lō jēsina sahasra gōdānaphala siddhigā śrīlakṣmīnārā
yaṇā¨rpaṇamugā nācaṁdrā¨rkasthāyigā saka
lajanaṁbulu mudamoṁda kavijanaṁbulu gī
¨rtiṁpa saṁtōṣaṁbugā paramadhārmikuṁḍai
na pakīraṁnna gaṭṭiṁcina dāsuti kūpadharmaśā
sanaṁ . svadattā dviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānu
pālanaṁ paradattāpahārēṇa svadattā niṣphalaṁ
bhavēt . pakīraṁnna dharmāpatniyaina lakṣmi manasiddhāgā puṇya
phalaṁbu boṁduṭaku śrīlakṣmīnārāyaṇārpaṇama
stū . śrīrāma śrīrāma śrīrāma
Digital edition of SII 40.72 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
